Skip to contents
tritonIngest 0.7.1
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Read & dates

Read tabular sources as all-text so fragile notation survives; verify the file’s type from its bytes; coerce mixed date encodings.

read_tabular()
Read a tabular data file (CSV/TSV/XLSX) as all-text columns.
sniff_format()
Identify a file's real type from its leading bytes.
coerce_excel_date()
Coerce mixed Excel-serial / date-string values to Date.

Worksheets

Enumerate workbook sheets and formula/merge features, then read selected or all sheets.

list_sheets()
List the worksheets of a workbook, with their visibility.
inspect_workbook()
Inspect formula and merge features in an OOXML workbook
read_all_sheets()
Read every worksheet of a workbook.

Clean structural junk

Recover the real header row and strip blank rows / spacer columns / label rows from dirty workbooks.

clean_table()
Clean a freshly-read table: promote the header and strip junk.
find_header_row()
Find the most likely header row in a header-less table.
drop_blank_rows()
Drop fully-blank rows from a data frame.
drop_blank_cols()
Drop fully-blank columns from a data frame.
drop_label_rows()
Drop label rows: rows carrying fewer than min_cells populated cells.

Reshape layout

Detect long / wide / transposed layout and reshape to long.

detect_layout()
Heuristically detect whether a table is long/tidy or wide.
melt_wide()
Melt a wide table (variables as columns) to long form.
looks_transposed()
Does this table hold analytes down a column and samples across the header?
transpose_table()
Transpose an analyte-by-sample results matrix into a tidy long table.

Column contracts & mapping

Declare a schema, auto-map source columns onto it by exact / synonym / fuzzy match, coerce, and complete.

cf_field()
Build one contract field specification.
as_contract()
Coerce field specs into a contract tibble.
contract_fields()
Field names of a contract.
contract_fingerprint()
Deterministic fingerprint of a contract
auto_map()
Auto-map source columns onto a contract.
apply_column_map()
Apply a column mapping to a source data frame.
complete_to_contract()
Complete a mapped frame to the full contract schema.
contract_is_ready()
Is a mapped frame ready to use for a contract?
type_matches()
Check whether an actual R class satisfies an expected type spec
is_value_like()
Does a character vector look numeric-ish (allowing censored notation)?

Mapping profiles

Save, load, and manage named JSON column-mapping profiles for reuse across runs.

save_mapping_profile()
Save a contract/header-bound mapping profile
load_mapping_profile()
Load and validate a mapping profile
list_mapping_profiles()
List mapping profiles
delete_mapping_profile()
Delete a mapping profile
mapping_profiles_dir()
Resolve the mapping-profile directory
upgrade_mapping_profile()
Upgrade a legacy mapping profile without overwriting it

Lab values

Parse non-detects, substitute working values, and reconcile units.

parse_censored()
Parse raw result text into value / censoring / limit / qualifier.
apply_substitution()
Apply a simple substitution rule to censored values.
working_values()
Working numeric values for a censoring method.
convert_units()
Convert mass-concentration or mass-fraction values between common units.

Validation (generic)

Domain-agnostic schema checks that each return failures, then abort once with the collected set.

check_required_columns()
Check that required columns are present in a data frame
check_column_types()
Check that columns have expected types
check_no_na()
Check that key columns contain no NA values
check_unique()
Check that a set of columns forms a unique key
check_range()
Check that numeric columns fall inside declared bounds
check_monotonic()
Check that a date/numeric column runs monotonically
validate_against_contract()
Validate a (mapped) data frame against a contract.
validation_abort()
Abort with a classed error listing all collected validation failures

Cache

Materialise the canonical object to a fingerprinted fast-reload cache.

write_cache()
Write an object to the transformation-aware cache
read_cache()
Read a fresh, verified cache entry
cached_ingest()
Ingest a source using a verified cache
cache_dir()
Resolve the cache directory

Canonical artifacts & diagnostics

Write and verify language-neutral canonical bundles and structured diagnostics.

write_canonical_bundle()
Write a verified canonical interchange bundle
read_canonical_bundle()
Read and verify a canonical interchange bundle
tabular_diagnostic()
Build a structured tabular-ingestion diagnostic

On this page

Developed by Travis Shepherd.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
